About VapeHaven

We believe in delivering an exceptional vaping experience through premium quality, carefully curated flavors, and a commitment to our community across Australia.

✨

Premium Quality

Every SWIX device is crafted with top-grade materials and rigorously tested to ensure a smooth, consistent draw from the first puff to the last.

★

Curated Selection

Our 19 flavors are carefully selected and refined. We focus on perfecting every flavor profile in our collection.

✈

Australia-Wide

Free shipping on every order across Australia. Premium vaping accessible no matter where you are.

VapeHaven is proudly Australian-operated. For partnerships, wholesale inquiries, or just to say hello — we would love to hear from you.

Privacy Policy

Last updated: 1 March 2026

1. Information We Collect

When you visit VapeHaven or make a purchase, we may collect the following types of information:

  • Personal identification information (name, email address, phone number, shipping address)
  • Payment information (processed securely through our third-party payment provider)
  • Device and browser information collected automatically through cookies
  • Browsing behaviour and interaction data on our website

2. How We Use Your Information

We use the information we collect for the following purposes:

  • To process and fulfil your orders, including shipping and delivery
  • To communicate with you about your orders, account, or customer service enquiries
  • To improve our website, products, and overall customer experience
  • To send promotional materials and updates, where you have opted in
  • To comply with legal obligations and prevent fraudulent activity

3. Data Sharing

We do not sell your personal information to third parties. We may share your data with trusted service providers who assist us in operating our business, including payment processors, shipping carriers, and analytics providers.

4. Cookies

Our website uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience, analyse site traffic, and personalise content. You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings.

5. Data Security

We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information. All payment transactions are encrypted using SSL technology.

6. Your Rights

Under the Australian Privacy Act 1988, you have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your personal information. Contact us at [email protected].

7. Age Verification

VapeHaven is intended for users of legal smoking age in their jurisdiction. We reserve the right to verify age at any point during the purchasing process.

8. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.

Questions? Contact us at [email protected].

© 2026 VapeHaven — All Rights Reserved

Terms of Service

Last updated: 1 March 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using the VapeHaven website, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations.

2. Age Requirement

You must be of legal smoking age in your state or territory of residence to use this website and purchase products. VapeHaven reserves the right to cancel any order where age verification cannot be completed.

3. Products and Pricing

Prices are listed in Australian Dollars (AUD) and include GST where applicable. We reserve the right to modify prices at any time without prior notice.

4. Orders and Payment

By placing an order, you are making an offer to purchase. We reserve the right to accept or decline any order. Payment must be completed at the time of purchase.

5. Shipping and Delivery

VapeHaven offers free shipping on all orders within Australia. Estimated delivery times are provided as a guide and are not guaranteed.

6. Returns and Refunds

We are unable to accept returns on opened or used items. If you receive a defective or incorrect product, contact us within 7 days of delivery. Unopened items may be returned within 14 days of receipt.

7. Intellectual Property

All content on this website is the property of VapeHaven and is protected by Australian and international intellectual property laws.

8. Limitation of Liability

VapeHaven shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use of our products or website.

9. Governing Law

These Terms of Service are governed by the laws of Australia.

10. Changes to Terms

We reserve the right to update these Terms at any time. Continued use constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

Questions? Contact us at [email protected].
